description: Implement Execution/WriteScopeCheck.cs (keyed on task.json.writeScope presence; runs after the action and before the task's guardrails as a deterministic read-only git-diff membership test) plus the TaskNode.WriteScope field, the GR2019/GR2020 scope validation, the scoped revert on failure (git checkout <taskBase> -- <out-of-scope paths>, keeping in-scope WIP), and wire it into TaskExecutor - making WriteScopeCheckTests pass without editing them
